profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Lion Metal Works Tbk manufactures and sells office equipment in Indonesia. It operates through two segments: Office Equipment and Building Materials. The company offers office equipment, such as filing cabinets, horizontal file cabinets, modular units, office chairs, office desks, mobile file systems, office panels, steel lockers and cupboards. It also provides racking systems comprising heavy duty, medium duty, light duty, radio shuttle, and other racking systems; fireproof filling cabinets, fireproof safes, and high security safes; and construction material, warehouse equipment, and safe and security equipment. In addition, the company offers building materials, such as cable support systems and steel and fire doors; and C-channel and related products. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
